name: Chicken-Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cooked Chicken, cut into chunky pieces
3/4 cup Grapes, red, halved and seeded
20 ounces Canned pineapple chunks (in natural juice, drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the chicken, celery, grapes, pineapple, and oranges together lightly in a bowl.
2. Add 3 tablespoons of pecans to the mixture.
3. Mix gently with salad dressing and salt until combined.
4. Chill the salad.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves.
6. Garnish with remaining pecans.
